page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8ae.32xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by the AMD EPYC 9T34 processor. Running on a KVM hypervisor, this instance features 128 dedicated physical cores and 128 vCPUs, operating at a clock speed of 3.4 GHz with a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration. The system is equipped with 512.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced memory-to-core ratio of 4.0 GB per core.

This instance does not include local NVMe SSD storage or integrated GPU hardware accelerators, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached block storage. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 64 Gbps, facilitating high-throughput data transfers. The instance does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

The dedicated CPU allocation and high core density offer predictable compute performance for enterprise workloads. The 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio positions this instance as a general-purpose resource, suitable for multi-threaded applications, enterprise web serving, and distributed database nodes that require consistent processing power without the overhead of hyperthreading.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8ae.32xlarge is a general-purpose instance powered by a 3.4 GHz AMD EPYC 9T34 processor. Built on the x86_64 architecture and managed via KVM virtualization, it provides 128 dedicated physical cores and 128 vCPUs with a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration. The instance features 512.0 GB of system memory, maintaining a balanced ratio of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying entirely on network-attached storage options. Network performance is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 64 Gbps. This hardware profile is designed for workloads requiring high-density dedicated compute resources, such as enterprise application hosting, large-scale web serving, and distributed database deployments.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8ae.32xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 128 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 512 GB RAM, and 64 Gbps network bandwidth, running on a KVM hypervisor with no local storage.

tagline: A dedicated 128-core AMD EPYC compute platform with a balanced memory profile and high-speed network connectivity for enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 128 dedicated AMD EPYC 9T34 physical cores operating at 3.4 GHz
512.0 GB of system memory providing a balanced 4.0 GB per core ratio
64 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for high-throughput data transfers
No local storage or GPU accelerators, requiring network-attached storage
